name: lottostat-ai
description: LottoStat AI - ניתוח סטטיסטי של הגרלות לוטו בישראל

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build:client: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
